description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% viscose, with mildly puffed cap sleeves, ribbed collar, screen print on the front and a mid-back stitchFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Dry flat in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Stay in trend forever in this absolutely comfortable top from the united colors of benetton.
